metadata.title: Atelier UI — Handcrafted React Animations & UI Components
metadata.description: Atelier UI is a growing collection of quality web animations built with React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Motion and React Three Fiber.

login.magic-link-sent: If an account exists with that email, a login link has been sent. Check your inbox
login.intro: If you already have a license, we'll email you a secure link to sign in.

success.title: Thank you for your support! ♥️
success.subtitle: You now have access to everything on atelier, forever.
success.footer-note: Add the key to your .env.local file to access pro components via CLI.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.email-failed: The link you used to access the page is invalid or expired, try again.
error.payment-failed: We couldn't verify your purchase. Try signing in from your account.
error.help: If the problem persists, <link>send us an email</link> and include the address you used at purchase.

guest-dropdown.intro: Sign in to access pro components and get your license key.

account-dropdown.license-help: Copy and add to your .env file to install pro components.

license-helper.title: Your license key
license-helper.description: Needed to install pro component — see instructions below.
license-helper.sign-in-prompt: Sign in to view your license key.

paywall.title: Unlock component
paywall.description: Unlock the source code and CLI installation with a one-time license.
paywall.footer-note: One-time payment. Lifetime access to all current and future pro components.
